Business: Radico Khaitan Limited engages in the manufacture and trading of Indian made foreign liquor (IMFL) and country liquor in India, the United States, and internationally. It provides IMFL products in various categories of whisky, brandy, rum, gin, vodka, and liqueurs. The company also provides bottling services to other spirit manufacturers. It offers…

  Current: 15.81  (-2.11% vs prior)
  India impact: High VIX → risk-off, FII sell EMs including India; low VIX → risk-on, inflows
